 {"id":"franken_numpy-i0b0","title":"Propagate NaN in non-spectral condition numbers","description":"## Problem
`cond_p_nxn` currently routes non-spectral orders (`fro`, `1`, `-1`, `inf`, `-inf`) through `inv_nxn`, which rejects non-finite inputs. NumPy instead returns `nan` for these orders when the input contains `NaN` values.

## Evidence
- `np.linalg.cond([[nan,1],[2,3]], "fro") -> nan`
- same for orders `1`, `-1`, `inf`, `-inf`
- current Rust path errors before any norm product can be formed

## Goal
Match NumPy by propagating `NaN` for non-spectral condition-number orders without changing existing SVD-based error behavior for `p=None`, `2`, and `-2`.

## Files
- `crates/fnp-linalg/src/lib.rs`","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-31T18:28:56.590190076Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-31T18:31:25.967674473Z","closed_at":"2026-03-31T18:31:25.967370838Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"franken_numpy-i7gs","title":"Add ufunc differential parity for take_along_axis and put_along_axis","description":"No ready beads remain beyond franken_numpy-rosd, so continue the fallback parity wave. Update the oracle capture artifact accordingly and verify with rch-backed cargo checks/tests.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-15T04:05:42.275617705Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-15T04:10:56.602470792Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","parity","ufunc"]}

Update the oracle capture artifact accordingly and verify with rch-backed cargo checks/tests.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-15T04:05:42.275617705Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-15T04:20:52.813972550Z","closed_at":"2026-04-15T04:20:52.811975317Z","close_reason":"Work already present in HEAD; verified with CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 rch exec -- cargo check -p fnp-conformance --all-targets and CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 rch exec -- cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_ufunc_differential (381/381 passing). core_suites_are_green is currently blocked by unrelated stale raptorq_artifacts durability sidecars.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","parity","ufunc"]}
